name: codex-harness
description: Codex-native routing, specialist agents, verified coding workflow, Ponytail minimalism, Context7, and CodeGraph integration.

interface.shortDescription: Route, simplify, and verify coding work
interface.longDescription: Routes small tasks directly and coordinates specialist roles for complex changes, applies Ponytail's smallest-correct-solution discipline, and uses optional Context7 and CodeGraph context.
defaultPrompt: harness: implement this complex change with specialist review.
direct: fix this localized bug with tests.
